svg.title: Kitchen memory fragment (apartment two)
svg.desc: Cropped vignette: an apartment-two kitchen at late-night. Refrigerator door cracked open and glowing into a tired, fluorescent-lit counter. A grocery bag sits half-unpacked, reused containers stack on the counter, magnets and notes cling to the freezer door. Uneven cool light from above, warm spill from the fridge.
